operational_knowledge_units.title: Tote model enumerations in Sorter Sweeper Database
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide documents Tote Model value sets used in the Sorter Sweeper Database, including tote status values, tote error values, exchange type values, and additional tote-related flags or lane exchange fields.
observed_evidence: Slide title: 'Sorter Sweeper Database / Tote Model'
Visible text under 'Tote Status': InTransit, AtTipper, AtSorter, PickupToteSent, Removed, AtSorterLifted, AtInduction, AtHospital
Visible text under 'Tote Error': NoRead, MissMatch, AgvRemoved
Visible text under 'ExchangeType': SystemGenerated, MissSort, HotBin, HotBinCloseOut, HotBinDisabled, CloseOut, Purge, UserSent, CloseOutLowest
Additional visible labels: ExchangedLanes, LaneCloseout, SorterSideCloseout, AgvCalled, FlaggedByBagger, TipperDisabled
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Sorter Sweeper Database Tote Model reference. Tote Status values: InTransit, AtTipper, AtSorter, PickupToteSent, Removed, AtSorterLifted, AtInduction, AtHospital. Tote Error values: NoRead, MissMatch, AgvRemoved. ExchangeType values: SystemGenerated, MissSort, HotBin, HotBinCloseOut, HotBinDisabled, CloseOut, Purge, UserSent, CloseOutLowest. Additional tote-related fields or flags shown: ExchangedLanes with LaneCloseout and SorterSideCloseout, AgvCalled, FlaggedByBagger, TipperDisabled.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Observed tote lifecycle and exception categories represented in the database model
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The tote model reflects operational tracking of tote location/state, exception/error conditions, and exchange causes across sorter-related subsystems such as tipper, sorter, induction, hospital, and AGV-related handling.
observed_evidence: Tote status values reference operational positions or conditions: AtTipper, AtSorter, AtInduction, AtHospital, InTransit, Removed, AtSorterLifted, PickupToteSent
Tote error values reference exception conditions: NoRead, MissMatch, AgvRemoved
ExchangeType values reference causes or triggers for tote exchange: MissSort, HotBin, CloseOut, Purge, UserSent, SystemGenerated
Visual elements list systems/components including AGV, Tipper, Hospital, Tote
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: The Sorter Sweeper Database tote model appears to track tote lifecycle positions and exception categories. Statuses include AtTipper, AtSorter, AtInduction, AtHospital, InTransit, Removed, AtSorterLifted, and PickupToteSent. Errors include NoRead, MissMatch, and AgvRemoved. Exchange types include operational causes such as MissSort, HotBin, CloseOut, Purge, UserSent, and SystemGenerated. This indicates database-level representation of tote movement, exception handling, and exchange reasons across sorter-related components.
